inputs_checked: visible data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch*.json prep artifacts for selected alias ids
selection_notes: Derived unresolved entity duplicate-key rows directly from current canonical entity JSONL using the deterministic identityKeysForRecord implementation, without invoking the validate CLI.
Focused on later issue-list rows around the NYPD, SIR/SIRTOA, MTA HQ, SMG, and generic-title/parent-child false positives, rather than earlier 210/211 candidates.
Avoided obvious batch212-looking clusters such as MTA Procurement and NYCT committee/member-list cleanup.
Selected alias ids were absent from current entity merges, absent from canonical identity_aliases, absent from exact DNM pairs, and not found as selected aliases in visible identity prep artifacts.
